summary: Iteration 273: Browser Video Export Testing - Asset proxy endpoint works perfectly (19/19 backend tests passed). Video export via MediaRecorder WebM fallback successful - produced 2.9MB video in 42 seconds. FFmpeg.wasm failed to load (module not found) but fallback worked. All scene images and audio accessible via proxy.

ui_bugs.issue: Download button shows 'Download MP4' but file is actually WebM when fallback is used

integration_issues.issue: FFmpeg.wasm core module fails to load from unpkg.com CDN - fallback to MediaRecorder WebM works
integration_issues.note: Error: Cannot find module 'https://unpkg.com/@ffmpeg/core@0.12.10/dist/esm/ffmpeg-core.js' - both toBlobURL and direct URL methods fail

action_items: Consider using jsdelivr CDN instead of unpkg for FFmpeg.wasm core files (more reliable)
Update download button label to show actual format (WebM vs MP4) when fallback is used
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Asset proxy endpoint (/api/pipeline/asset-proxy) works correctly
VERIFIED: Proxy properly rejects non-R2 URLs with 403 Forbidden
VERIFIED: Proxy returns correct content-type headers (image/png, audio/mpeg)
VERIFIED: All 3 scene images accessible via proxy (1536x1024 PNG)
VERIFIED: All 3 scene audio files accessible via proxy (MP3)
VERIFIED: Preview endpoint returns complete scene data with URLs
VERIFIED: MediaRecorder WebM fallback produces valid 2.9MB video
VERIFIED: Video export completes in ~42 seconds for 3 scenes (~38 seconds total audio)
NOTE: FFmpeg.wasm module loading fails - needs CDN investigation

success_rate.frontend: 95% - Export works via WebM fallback, FFmpeg MP4 export fails due to CDN module loading issue

seed_data_creation: No new seed data - used existing completed job 'Desert Oasis'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Asset proxy endpoint fully working. Video export works via MediaRecorder WebM fallback (2.9MB video produced). FFmpeg.wasm MP4 export fails due to CDN module loading issue (unpkg.com). Consider switching to jsdelivr CDN for FFmpeg core files. All preview page UI elements working correctly.

asset_proxy_endpoint.details: GET /api/pipeline/asset-proxy?url=<r2_url> returns file contents with correct content-type

export_panel.details: Shows 720p, MP4, 3 scenes, 'Export MP4 Video' button

video_export_ffmpeg.note: Both toBlobURL and direct URL methods fail

video_export_mediarecorder.details: WebM fallback works - produced 2.9MB video in 42 seconds

export_test_logs: [BrowserExport] toBlobURL load failed: undefined, trying direct URLs...
Export failed: Error: Cannot find module 'https://unpkg.com/@ffmpeg/core@0.12.10/dist/esm/ffmpeg-core.js'
